semantics: Status describes repository evidence, not marketing scope. The validator proves schema, fixed inventory and artifact-path integrity only; semantic truth remains human-reviewed and each boundary controls the claim.

capabilities.claim: Agent Skills directory, frontmatter, routed references and OpenAI UI metadata are present.
capabilities.boundary: Local skill-creator and installability validation passed at this snapshot; host discovery still requires installation in that host and is not inferred from file validity.

capabilities.claim: Project scan, model routing, evidence ledger, scorer and fail-closed schemas have automated tests.
capabilities.boundary: Passing unit tests verifies implemented invariants only; it does not make a weak model truthful or visually capable.

capabilities.claim: IA manifests, end-to-end user flows, responsive wireframe plans and local XML sitemaps have fail-closed cross-artifact validation and hostile tests.
capabilities.boundary: Passing schemas and hostile tests proves the encoded planning invariants only; it does not prove research validity, usability, visual quality, production behavior, indexing or ranking.

capabilities.claim: A real zh-Hant showcase implements light/dark/system appearance and materially different desktop/mobile composition.
capabilities.boundary: Chrome/Playwright observations are bounded to recorded viewports and states; they are not cross-browser, assistive-technology, formal WCAG or universal visual-quality evidence.

capabilities.claim: Claude Haiku and Opus requested aliases generated the same non-landing product-dashboard brief and were independently browser-audited.
capabilities.boundary: Both failed strict acceptance; exact resolved model IDs were not reported. One pair cannot establish a model ranking.

capabilities.claim: One approved Haiku remediation invocation was attempted after adding the anti-slop contract.
capabilities.boundary: The output policy rejected styles.css before publish. No design artifact or improvement claim exists, and no second retry was used.

capabilities.claim: Eight non-landing product cases define audience, surface, brand, mobile and hidden acceptance pressure.
capabilities.boundary: Fixture schema and coverage are validated; the eight cases have not all been generated, browser-tested or scored.

capabilities.claim: The package follows Agent Skills structure and documents Codex, Claude Code, Copilot and Gemini discovery paths.
capabilities.boundary: Codex and Claude CLI were exercised in this work; Copilot, Gemini, Claude API and claude.ai installation/invocation were not integration-tested here.

capabilities.claim: The workflow preserves detected frameworks and routes version-specific behavior through adapters.
capabilities.boundary: No matrix proves equal behavior across React, Vue, Nuxt, Svelte, Angular, static HTML or native platforms. Framework-agnostic is an adaptation contract, not empirical certification.

capabilities.claim: Traditional Chinese is first-class and localization rules cover CJK, long text, mixed scripts and RTL boundaries.
capabilities.boundary: zh-Hant has rendered evidence and English appears in fixtures. RTL and broad locale expansion are documented checks, not completed integration coverage.

capabilities.claim: The skill defines WCAG 2.2 A/AA applicability, keyboard, zoom, focus, contrast and state gates.
capabilities.boundary: Sample browser checks found failures. The repository does not claim formal WCAG conformance or named screen-reader/browser support.

capabilities.claim: Motion, SVG and Lottie references have fail-closed static risk scanners and tests.
capabilities.boundary: Static scanning cannot prove rendering, animation lifecycle, loop quality, accessibility, runtime performance or player compatibility.

capabilities.claim: WebGL, Three.js, shader, video and advanced-media decisions include progressive fallback, teardown and performance boundaries.
capabilities.boundary: No WebGL runtime fixture or cross-device trace has passed in this repository. Version-sensitive implementation still requires official docs and target hardware.

capabilities.claim: SEO/AEO/GEO guidance and an advisory HTML scanner cover metadata, crawl policy and truthful structured data.
capabilities.boundary: Static signals cannot guarantee deployment HTTP behavior, indexing, ranking, rich results, AI answer inclusion or citation.

capabilities.claim: Attention, clutter, saliency, choice, persuasion and dark-pattern evidence is translated into bounded design hypotheses and release blockers.
capabilities.boundary: Citations and rules do not constitute user research for a target product. Attention, fixation, recall, preference, comprehension and conversion remain different outcomes.

capabilities.claim: A centralized anti-slop contract defines truth, task-surface, product-swap, representation, silhouette, mobile, state and evidence gates.
capabilities.boundary: Routing fixture validity and one rejected remediation run do not prove the contract consistently improves visual quality across models. Subjective craft still needs blind rendered review.

capabilities.claim: Local runtimes may be connected through an agent wrapper after explicit per-run consent.
capabilities.boundary: No local model was downloaded, started or evaluated in this work. Protocol adaptability is not a model-quality result.

capabilities.claim: Award criteria are creative review vocabulary only.
capabilities.boundary: No Awwwards submission, jury result, award prediction or certification exists. The internal scorecard is not mapped to Awwwards scoring.
